name: @metorial/spoki
description: Send and manage WhatsApp messages through the WhatsApp Business API. Create, update, and delete contacts with tags, custom fields, and list segmentation. Trigger automation workflows for multi-step messaging sequences. Send bulk campaigns to contact lists using approved template messages. Manage sales deals and pipelines. Receive webhook notifications for message, chat, contact, and deal events. Start AI-powered chatbot interactions. Embed WhatsApp inbox and chat interfaces into third-party applications.
